notes: Can refer to both pleasant and unpleasant smells. Often used with adjectives like 'angenehm' (pleasant) or 'unangenehm' (unpleasant).

sentences.german: Der Geruch von frischem Brot macht mich hungrig.
sentences.english: The smell of fresh bread makes me hungry.

sentences.german: Aus der Küche kamen verschiedene Gerüche.
sentences.english: Various smells came from the kitchen.
